title: Providers
subtitle: Upstream LLM providers routed by the gateway

apiUrls.chatBullet: chat — OpenAI-compatible endpoints, including Ollama's /v1 API
apiUrls.ollamaBullet: ollama — Native Ollama API, use the root URL (e.g. http://localhost:11434)

warnings.ollamaV1Prefix: native ollama type expects root URL. URLs with /v1 are OpenAI-compatible — use chat type.
warnings.chatOllamaPrefix: This URL contains /api/ paths typical of native Ollama. Use ollama type if native.

quota.title: Quota Checker
quota.oauthOnlyChecker: Only the '{{checker}}' checker is available for this OAuth provider.
quota.oauthNoChecker: No quota checker is available for this OAuth provider type.
quota.active: Quota checker is active for this provider.
quota.selectNone: Select <none> to disable provider quota checks.

gpu.title: GPU Profile
gpu.hint: Used for inference energy calculation. Select a preset or enter custom GPU specs.

oauth.title: OAuth Authentication
oauth.tokensHint: Tokens are saved to auth.json after login.
oauth.complete: Authentication complete. Tokens saved to auth.json.

fetchModels.title: Fetch Models from Provider
fetchModels.oauthPlaceholder: OAuth providers use built-in model lists
fetchModels.emptyOAuth: Click Fetch to load known OAuth models
fetchModels.emptyUrl: Enter a URL and click Fetch to load available models

delete.title: Delete Provider: {{name}}
delete.intro: Choose how to delete this provider. The action cannot be undone.
delete.cascadeBody: Removes this provider AND deletes all model alias targets that reference it.
delete.noAliases: No model aliases reference this provider.
delete.retainBody: Removes only the provider. Model alias targets that reference this provider will remain but may cause errors.
delete.orphaned: {{count}} model alias(es) will have orphaned targets.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.adaptersHint: Adapters rewrite requests and responses to fix provider-specific field-name incompatibilities. Applied to every model under this provider unless overridden per-model.

reasoning_content.label: Reasoning Content
reasoning_content.description: Maps reasoning ↔ reasoning_content on messages and responses (e.g. Fireworks DeepSeek-R1).

suppress_developer_role.label: Suppress Developer Role
suppress_developer_role.description: Rewrites the "developer" role to "system" for providers that do not support it.

advanced.timeoutHint: Override the global default timeout for this provider. Leave empty to use the global default. Must be between 1 and 3600.
advanced.stallHint: Override the global stall detection settings for this provider. Leave empty to use the global setting for each field.
advanced.ttfbTimeoutHint: 5–120 seconds. Leave empty for global default.
advanced.ttfbBytesHint: 50–10,000 bytes. Leave empty for global default.
advanced.minBpsHint: 50–5,000 B/s. Leave empty for global default.
advanced.stallWindowHint: 3–30 seconds. Leave empty for global default.
advanced.stallGraceHint: 0–120 seconds. Leave empty for global default.
advanced.estimateTokensHint: Enable token estimation only when a provider does not return usage data.
advanced.disableCooldownHint: When enabled, this provider will never be placed on cooldown.
advanced.disableCooldownWarn: Use only for providers with reliable external rate-limit handling.
advanced.claudeMaskingHint: When enabled, requests to this Anthropic provider will be masked as Claude Code CLI sessions.

models.title: Provider Models
models.accessViaHint: Choose which API protocols this model should use.
models.accessViaEmpty: Empty selection — Plexus will use any API type configured for this provider.
models.openrouterInfo: Pricing is fetched from OpenRouter. Enter the model slug below.
models.noRanges: No ranges defined. Pricing will likely default to 0.
models.flatFeeHint: A flat fee charged per API call, regardless of token count.
models.modelAdaptersHint: Override or extend provider-level adapters for this specific model.
models.nativeOllamaAccessHint: This provider has a native Ollama base URL. To route through native Ollama, select ollama under Access Via (APIs).

form.oauthAccountBeforeLogin: OAuth account is required before starting login
form.fetchOAuthEmpty: No models found for OAuth provider '{{provider}}'.
